info.description: High-performance Go backend for the Chanom Twitter clone.
info.title: Twitter Go API

post.description: Interact with the Gemini-powered AI assistant. It provides streaming responses (SSE) and has access to recent tweet context via RAG.
Exchange a Google ID token for a JWT access and refresh token.
Revoke the user session and clear access/refresh tokens.

parameters.description: Optional Refresh Token to revoke explicitly
parameters.name: request

get.description: Fetch the profile of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Obtain a new access token and refresh token using an existing refresh token.

get.description: Get a list of currently trending hashtags based on recent usage.
Get a paginated list of suggested users to follow.
Get a paginated list of tweets from users the current user follows.
Get a paginated list of all tweets.
Get a paginated list of tweets for a specific user profile.
Simple health check to verify the API server is running and reachable.
Get a paginated list of the current user's conversations.
Get a paginated list of messages in a specific conversation.

post.description: Send a message to an existing conversation thread.
Start a new conversation or send a message to a user by their ID.

get.description: Establish a WebSocket connection to receive real-time direct messages. Supports authentication via 'access_token' query param or 'Authorization' header.

parameters.description: JWT Access Token (if not using Authorization header)
parameters.name: access_token

get.description: Get a paginated list of social notifications (likes, follows, etc.) for the current user.

post.description: Clear all unread notification badges for the current user.

get.description: Establish a Server-Sent Events (SSE) connection to receive near real-time notifications for likes, replies, retweets, and new followers.
Calculate how many unread notifications the current user has.
Comprehensive readiness check that verifies active connections to the database and Redis cache.
Find trending or specific hashtags matching a prefix.
Search for tweets by content (using full-text search) with pagination.
Search for users by username or display name with pagination.

post.description: Post a new tweet with optional text and media.

get.description: Fetch a single tweet by its ID.

delete.description: Remove a tweet by ID. Only the author can delete their own tweet.

post.description: Add a like to a tweet.

delete.description: Remove a like from a tweet.

get.description: Get a paginated list of replies to a specific tweet.

post.description: Share a tweet on your own profile.
Generate a temporary presigned URL to upload a file directly to S3.

put.description: Modify the display name, bio, or profile images of the authenticated user.

get.description: Get public profile information for a user by their ID.

post.description: Establish a following relationship with another user.

get.description: Get a paginated list of users following the specified user.
Get a paginated list of users followed by the specified user.

BearerAuth.description: Type 'Bearer ' followed by your JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
